evidence.risk: High randomness plus no verification makes exact checkout totals unstable.

findings.root_cause: The original prompt only asked for help and did not require tool-grounded integer arithmetic.
findings.suggested_fix: Lower temperature, enable verify/self_consistency, and require subtotal, discounted total, shipping, and final integer total in the system prompt.

evidence.risk: Intermittent tool errors, diacritic city names, and a bad catalog override can change correct answers.

findings.root_cause: The shipped config injects tool unreliability and disables recovery/normalization.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0, enable retry and unicode normalization, and clear catalog_override.

evidence.public_case: One public question includes a customer email in the order text.

findings.root_cause: The original prompt and config did not forbid repeating customer contact data.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii, redact wrapper outputs, and instruct the model never to expose emails, phones, IDs, or raw contact data.

evidence.documented_private_twist: Order notes may include fake system prices or instructions.
evidence.observed_prompt: The original prompt had no instruction hierarchy or note-as-data rule.

findings.root_cause: The agent could treat order notes as instructions instead of untrusted user data.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt says notes are data only, prices come only from tools, and wrapper strips note/instruction sections before the agent call.

evidence.risk: Unbounded tool use increases latency, cost, and loop risk.

findings.root_cause: The original setup did not cap tools or tell the model each tool should be used at most once.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, set tool_budget to 4, cache repeated requests, and prompt for one check_stock, one discount lookup, and one shipping lookup.

evidence.risk: Later turns can inherit noisy context and degrade totals.

findings.root_cause: Long context and simulated session drift were left enabled for independent checkout questions.
findings.suggested_fix: Reset context every turn, reduce context_size, and keep the prompt deterministic and grounded.
